entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important food legume crop for rainfed agriculture in developing countries, particularly India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where pigeonpea is a significant crop for rainfed agriculture

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practice relying on rainfall, common for pigeonpea in developing countries

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity measure of pigeonpea that has remained static and needs improvement

entities.name: UNCERTAIN CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Changing and unpredictable weather patterns that aggravate the challenge of improving crop yield

entities.name: GENOMIC TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Modern tools used to rapidly improve breeding traits for stress resistance

entities.name: BIOTIC AND ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental and biological pressures that crops must resist to maintain productivity

entities.name: PIGEONPEA GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the pigeonpea genome used to develop large-scale genomic tools

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Large-scale resources developed from genomics to accelerate breeding programs

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to develop improved crop cultivars

entities.name: HIGH-DENSITY GENOTYPING ASSAYS
entities.description: Tools used to identify genetic variations to motivate the adoption of genomic selection

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING PLATFORMS
entities.description: Tools used to rapidly measure physical traits to motivate the adoption of genomic selection

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique used for improving complex traits based on genomic data

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Agricultural traits controlled by multiple genes that are improved via genomic selection

entities.name: REMOTE BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using genomic selection predictions for genotype selection for future climates

entities.name: FUTURE CLIMATES
entities.description: Predicted climatic conditions for which genotype selection is required

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A method to accelerate the breeding cycle to produce cultivars with resilient traits

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: Technologies used within speed breeding to increase the number of generations per year

entities.name: RESILIENT TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that allow cultivars to cope with climatic adversities and stresses

entities.name: VARIETAL TURNOVER
entities.description: The acceleration of replacing old cultivars with new ones to keep pace with changing climatic conditions
